title: Linear Weapons
description: This mod adds 14 New Categories of Weapons going from Wooden all the way to Netherite for a total of 84 items! Everything this mod adds is in Vanilla+ Style.
body:
![Every single weapon in the mod in all tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09b0d1a41bbea622cf85c0b66b5b1a5f46d342d9.png) >Minecraft combat shouldn’t stop at swords and axes. ## FEATURES Expand vanilla combat with **84+ new weapons** across **14 unique weapon classes**, all designed to feel balanced, immersive, and naturally integrated into Minecraft. ### Included Weapon Types
Scythes Sword type weapon
Longswords Sword type weapon
Katanas Sword type weapon
Sickles Sword type weapon
Glaives Sword type weapon
Dualblades Sword type weapon
Spears Single target type weapon
Rapiers Single target type weapon
Knives Single target type weapon
Battle Axes Heavy type weapon
Halberds Heavy type weapon
Battle Hammers Heavy type weapon
Broadswords Heavy type weapon

SWORD BASED COMBAT

Fast, versatile fighting focused on sweeping attacks and adaptability. Ideal for: - Crowd control - General survival - Aggressive PvP - Balanced gameplay ### HEAVY BASED COMBAT Slow, powerful weapons built around high damage and deliberate timing. Ideal for: - Heavy hits - High-risk combat - Punishing mistakes - Single-target damage ### SINGLE BASED COMBAT Weapons specialized around either exceptional speed or extended reach. Ideal for: - Spacing opponents - Hit-and-run combat - PvP optimization - Specialized playstyles ## VANILLA FRIENDLY **Completely compatible** with normal Minecraft combat and built around the ideas of vanilla+. Have fun with this balanced, and expansive mod.
